boundary: This queue is execution scaffolding only. It cannot satisfy a material suitability claim without real source files, QC-clean rows, gate passes, and claim_ready=true.
purpose: Convert the smoke capture tranche into field-level execution rows with source-file destinations and post-fill checks.

queue.capture_instruction: Capture date with record_review; Fill the matching long-form row value plus measured_at, operator_or_agent, instrument_id when measured, and source_file.
queue.source_file_requirement: Bench sheet, vendor report, or chain-of-custody CSV.

queue.capture_instruction: Capture medium_name with record_review; Fill the matching long-form row value plus measured_at, operator_or_agent, instrument_id when measured, and source_file.
queue.source_file_requirement: Medium bottle photo, lot CoA, or chain-of-custody record.

queue.capture_instruction: Capture medium_lot with record_review; Fill the matching long-form row value plus measured_at, operator_or_agent, instrument_id when measured, and source_file.
queue.source_file_requirement: Lot CoA, bottle label image, or chain-of-custody record.

queue.capture_instruction: Capture temperature_c with temperature_probe_or_incubator_log; Fill the matching long-form row value plus measured_at, operator_or_agent, instrument_id when measured, and source_file.
queue.source_file_requirement: Incubator log, probe export, or time-stamped photo.

queue.capture_instruction: Record build/supplier provenance for mea_coupon_id; Fill the matching long-form row value plus measured_at, operator_or_agent, instrument_id when measured, and source_file.
queue.source_file_requirement: Build sheet, sample label, or chain-of-custody record.

queue.capture_instruction: Record build/supplier provenance for electrode_material; Fill the matching long-form row value plus measured_at, operator_or_agent, instrument_id when measured, and source_file.
queue.source_file_requirement: Supplier documentation, build sheet, or sample label record.

queue.capture_instruction: Record build/supplier provenance for laminin_or_peptide_density; Fill the matching long-form row value plus measured_at, operator_or_agent, instrument_id when measured, and source_file.

queue.capture_instruction: Record build/supplier provenance for sterilization_or_aseptic_protocol; Fill the matching long-form row value plus measured_at, operator_or_agent, instrument_id when measured, and source_file.
queue.source_file_requirement: SOP identifier, batch record, or chain-of-custody record.

queue.capture_instruction: Capture pH with calibrated_pH_meter; Fill the matching long-form row value plus measured_at, operator_or_agent, instrument_id when measured, and source_file.
queue.source_file_requirement: Meter export, calibration log, or time-stamped display photo reconciled to run_id.

queue.capture_instruction: Obtain external report/export for osmolality; Fill the matching long-form row value plus measured_at, operator_or_agent, instrument_id when measured, and source_file.
queue.source_file_requirement: Osmometer report/export reconciled to run_id.
